case_title: HANNAH WEITZENFELD ET AL VS. MAZIN NABA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS HANNAH WEITZENFELD (APPEARING BY ZOOM) AND JOSHUA SLAYEN IS PRESENT (IN COURT). DEFENDANT MAZIN NABA IS PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PARTIES RETAINED . CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
